title: SüperTürk
overview: What makes a superhero? Of course, he flies and splits fruit or other objects in two with rays of light from his eyes. He cheats at gambling without anyone noticing, and his mother has lead poured and beads strung to protect him from the evil eye! Although his family manages to keep this super kid, SuperTurk, out of sight and hide his abilities for a long time, one day he is accidentally exposed. Now he has to shuttle between TV channels, doing monkey business for people...
